evals.prompt: I need to build a React dashboard that fetches daily stock prices from a public API and displays them in a chart.
evals.expected_output: Agent should analyze the request, create a phased plan, verify it, and then prompt the user to choose between Gemini 3.5 Flash (High) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 before executing.

assertions.name: creates_plan_artifact
assertions.description: The subagent creates an artifact named plan.md or tasks.md

assertions.name: plan_has_checkboxes
assertions.description: The plan contains markdown checkboxes like [ ] or [x] for tracking tasks

assertions.name: stops_for_model_selection
assertions.description: The subagent stops execution and asks the user to choose between Gemini 3.5 Flash (High) and Claude Sonnet 4.6

evals.prompt: Create a plan to refactor my Python backend from Flask to FastAPI, including testing.
evals.expected_output: Agent should analyze the request, create a phased plan, verify it, and then prompt the user to choose between Gemini 3.5 Flash (High) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 before executing.

assertions.name: creates_plan_artifact
assertions.description: The subagent creates an artifact named plan.md or tasks.md

assertions.name: plan_has_checkboxes
assertions.description: The plan contains markdown checkboxes like [ ] or [x] for tracking tasks

assertions.name: stops_for_model_selection
assertions.description: The subagent stops execution and asks the user to choose between Gemini 3.5 Flash (High) and Claude Sonnet 4.6
